name: @pagemint/demo-video
description: Remotion demo of the PageMint extension in action.

scripts.build:gif:lean: pnpm run build && ffmpeg -y -i out/pagemint-demo.mp4 -vf "fps=15,scale=900:-1:flags=lanczos,split[s0][s1];[s0]palettegen=max_colors=128[p];[s1][p]paletteuse=dither=bayer:bayer_scale=4" -loop 0 out/pagemint-demo.gif
scripts.publish:site: mkdir -p ../site/public/demo && cp out/pagemint-demo.gif ../site/public/demo/pagemint-demo.gif && echo 'Copied to apps/site/public/demo/pagemint-demo.gif'
scripts.publish:all: pnpm run publish:site && pnpm run publish:extension
scripts.build:and:publish: pnpm run build:gif:lean && pnpm run publish:all
